Alright, welcome back. Okay, so if you're doing EFT to remote or HDP, so you're saying you can't stay here You can train here, but it's gonna be a one-on-four setting Or you can say at the same price and go remote So that way it's like if you if you insist on training in person You can have HDP at a one-on-four pricing Which is $500 $700 a month Or you can do remote only and I'm gonna train you one-on-one But either way you're training with a coach want basically one-on-one and so This still eliminates a lot all the the challenge managers the retention managers a lot of the admin work Because now everyone has a direct point of contact. Okay, so how does this script go? All right, so the first thing is like listen I've been doing this a while is you'll notice that this is similar to the to the EFT district remote a couple couple key changes I you know, I started one-on-one. I just started trying to do group to save on time You know, but when I look back at my results kind of made me sick, right? I looked at my wall of shame right this used to be really proud But now I see that a lot of people aren't here anymore a lot of people lost, you know lost the way in getting it back And honestly when I see people come in the group and I know that the average person stays for four and a half months I'm not really changing anyone's life, right? I just have a little hamster wheel where people kind of get motivated and they fall off, right? And so it's just the conclusion I've had is that everyone needs a coach everyone needs I have a coach everyone needs coach, right? and now that I have one-on-one clients and that Refocused on that they're getting better like not even close better results than all the clients that I have in person for You know group training and so They're focused on what matters right the food and lifestyle because the 90% is what matters not the 10% Which is the fitness component which most people are putting all their attention here And that's why your results have been stagnant, right? And so you're still going to loop it back to the lack of accountability the lack of of Sustainability etc. Is like you're putting all your effort into the vehicle that is the 10% contributor not the 90% Right and so, you know in an effort to help everyone get the best results I'm switching back from group training to 101 and some of my privates only because this way I can actually help people and not feel sick To my stomach every night when I think about like whether I'm fulfilling my promises, alright? So number seven, you know what I'd like to do with you is work with you 101 Remotely for six weeks to kind of prove to you and show you how much better this is Because we're gonna focus on things that matter They're gonna see like what you signed up to accomplish when you got here, right? So I'm gonna be checking on you daily make sure that you're eating what you're supposed to in a way that's sustainable and make it impossible to fall off Okay, and so like no more templated solutions I have an entire six-month plan to get you to where you are are as good To get you where you are as good as me by the end, okay? What I mean by that is that like you're gonna be as good as I am by the end of this So like you could start your own, you know business with fitness because I'm gonna teach you how to think through this teach you how to do this Rather than always being relying on me, right? I'm gonna set you free from this so that you've seen me eat pizza you see me a cake, right? I'm still in shape and it's not because of the workouts It's because I know how to retool the rest of my my lifestyle to adjust for that so I can have my cake You need it to and I'm gonna show you how to do the same thing. All right, so number 10 listen Give it a shot. All right, give me six weeks And if you don't get better results in the same same AB like if you don't get better results in six weeks I'll give you money back or you can say if you don't lose at least 10 pounds the next six weeks I'll continue work with you until you do. Okay, providing you X Y and Z and so very similar The the hook here is that everyone is a one-on-one coach. It's a little bit stronger on that side and If someone just insists that like you should still be trying to sell remote primarily because it is about it is the it is the The lower-cost models more scalable model But if they insist on it, then it's like cool then what I'm gonna do is I'm assigned you to this coach for HTTP and So again, if you want you can give people a you know a 14-day trial or a seven-day trial of of HTTP And most people if they get semi-private attention, they realize how much better it is And so that's ultimately the the big hook is that you're going away from group training because you realize everyone needs a one-on-one coach And so it's not that you're against in person. It's fine But it's really the fact that everyone needs a one-on-one coach to hold them accountable to keep them with the food and and to stick with it and so When you're when you're talking about the you know the the large group training You can talk about how it's It's people are getting nearly as good results as the semi-private send the and the one-on-one remote clients because those are the ones that are That are really seeing seeing it work.
